## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Target Branch

- [ ] `develop`
- [ ] `staging`
- [ ] `main`

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run types:check`
- [ ] `php artisan test` or equivalent relevant checks
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed

## Deployment Impact

- [ ] No production impact
- [ ] Staging only
- [ ] Production-facing change

## Rollback Plan

Describe exactly how this change can be reverted or disabled if deployment causes problems.

## Notes

List risks, follow-up work, or anything reviewers should watch closely.
